faqs.question: How much does centipede control cost in Glen Oaks?
faqs.answer: Our centipede control services in Glen Oaks range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: Why do I have centipedes in my Glen Oaks home?
faqs.answer: Centipedes are attracted to moisture and often enter Glen Oaks homes through cracks in foundations, basement windows, and gaps around doors. They feed on other insects and prefer damp areas like bathrooms, basements, and crawl spaces common in Queens homes.

faqs.question: Are centipedes dangerous to my family or pets?
faqs.answer: While centipedes can bite if handled, they are generally not dangerous to humans or pets. However, their presence usually indicates excess moisture and other pest problems. Our treatments safely eliminate centipedes while addressing underlying conditions that attract them.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat my Glen Oaks property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Glen Oaks residents. Most centipede treatments take 1-2 hours to complete, and you'll see significant reduction in centipede activity within 24-48 hours. We also provide follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination.
